intro: This digital exhibition reflects on Rizal's life, offering a glimpse into his many facets beyond the renowned hero: a gifted artist, an ethnographer championing Filipino culture, and an exceptional scholar.

blurbs.heading: About the National Museum of the Philippines
blurbs.body:
The National Museum of the Philippines is an educational, scientific, and cultural institution that acquires, documents, preserves, exhibits, and fosters scholarly studies and public appreciation of works of art, specimens, and cultural and historical artifacts representative of the unique cultural heritage of the Filipino people and natural history of the Philippines.

It manages and develops museums comprising the National Museum Complex in Manila as well as 20 regional museums in key locations across the country.

blurbs.heading: About the Ethnologisches Museum Berlin
blurbs.body: The Ethnologisches Museum Berlin aims to investigate the legacy and ramifications of colonialism, as well as the role and standpoint of Europe. Having the largest and most significant collections worldwide, the museum partnered with source communities in Africa, Asia, Oceania and America which put into context the interaction of cultures in fostering global understanding that goes beyond the Eurocentric viewpoint.
